---
title: "Schedule"
---

| Title | Location | Date | Time | Speaker |
|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|
| Intro to BDL | PSC LT | 14 Jan 2026 | 2 pm - 3 pm | Andreas |
| Laplace Redux | PSC LT | 21 Jan 2026 | 2 pm - 3 pm | Lanya |
| Robust & Conjugate Spatio-Temporal GPs | PSC LT | 28 Jan 2026 | 2 pm - 3 pm | [William](https://williamlaplante.github.io) |
| Epistemic Neural Networks | PSC LT | 4 Feb 2026 | 2 pm - 3 pm | Paul |
| Reviewing BNNs | PSC LT | 11 Feb 2026 | 2 pm - 3 pm | Jixiang |
| GP Connections to BDL | PSC Lab 2 | [27 Feb 2026]{style="color:Red"} | 2 pm - 3 pm | [Jonas](https://latzplacian.org) |
| Stochastic Gradient MCMC | PSC LT | 4 Mar 2026 | 2 pm - 3 pm | Connie |
| Probabilistic Numerics | PSC LT | 18 Mar 2026 | 2 pm - 3 pm | Rui |
| A Clean Slate for Offline Reinforcement Learning | Fylde LT 2 A16 | 20 Mar 2026 | 3 pm - 4 pm |[Matt](https://matthewtjackson.com)
| Intelligent data acquisition using Bayesian principles | PSC LT | [27 Mar 2026]{style="color:Red"} | 2 pm - 3 pm | [Freddie](https://fbickfordsmith.com) |
